name: Wallos
description: Track your recurring subscriptions and expenses
compose:
name: slashnode-wallos
services:
  server:
    image: bellamy/wallos:4.9.6
    container_name: wallos
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      TZ: Etc/UTC
      PUID: '1000'
      PGID: '1000'
    volumes:
      - server_data-db:/var/www/html/db
      - server_data-logos:/var/www/html/images/uploads/logos
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8282:80
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data-db:
    name: slashnode-wallos_server_data-db
  server_data-logos:
    name: slashnode-wallos_server_data-logos
